title: EARTH EMPIRE
description: Exploration + Semi RPG Modpack for better feelings to be home.
body:
> New modpack that goes towards old modpack from lord of the rings,
> but into less stressful gameplay and more enjoyable. 
expect new things, more mobs, bosses.

![Moon Warrior](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3f2e84a2d8fe67c68636ef617433fc4a087238f_0.webp)


✔️ Explore over new biomes [In The Overworld, The Nether & The END]

✔️ A Bunch of New Dungeons & New Structures

✔️ New Mods to bring life to your world [Much more content to explore!]

✔️ A Brand New Experience of Modded Minecraft
